A string value exceeds the maximum lengt: 一個string 值exceeds maximum length allowed 由schema. field 有一個maxLength constraint that 此value violates.
A string value is shorter than the minim: 一個string 值是shorter 比minimum length 必需由schema. field 有一個minLength constraint that 此value violates.
A string value was found where an object: 一個string 值was found where 一個object was expected. form schema expects 此field 至be 一個object 使用properties, 不一個scalar string.
A subpack memory_tier value is below the: 一個subpack memory_tier 值是below minimum allowed. Memory tiers 必須meet 或exceed baseline requirement.

A true or false value. Alias for BOOLEAN: 一個true 或false value. Alias 為BOOLEAN.
A unique identifier string. Usually lowe: 一個unique identifier string. Usually lowercase 使用underscores.
一個value 使用一個unit suffix.

A whole number (no decimals). Alias for: 一個whole 數字(no decimals). Alias 為INT.
一個world setting that 可以be changed.

First value is depth - more negative mea: First 值是depth - more negative means deeper underwater, while more positive means higher. Second 值是scale, which affects how much noise changes 作為it moves 從surface.

For 'enchant_randomly': whether to inclu: 為'enchant_randomly': whether 至include treasure enchantments.

ID of the Potion effect for the default: ID 的Potion 效果為default projectile 至be applied 在hit.
ISO-8601 timestamp describing when this: ISO-8601 timestamp describing 當this 資訊設定was captured.

Returns 1.0 如果entity 是fleeing 從mobs, else it returns 0.0. Pertains 至wandering trader.

Returns 1.0 if the entity is resting, el: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是resting, else it returns 0.0. Applies generally 至bat.
Returns 1.0 if the entity is riding, els: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是riding, else it returns 0.0.
Returns 1.0 if the entity is rolling, el: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是rolling, else it returns 0.0. Applies generally 至panda.

Returns 1.0 if the entity is shaking wat: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是shaking water off, else it returns 0.0. Applies generally 至wet wolves.

Returns 1.0 if the entity is silent, els: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是silent, else it returns 0.0.

Returns 1.0 if the entity is swimming, e: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是swimming, else it returns 0.0.
Returns 1.0 if the entity is tamed, else: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是tamed, else it returns 0.0.

Returns 1.0 if the entity is using an it: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是using 一個item, else it returns 0.0. Applies generally 至allay.
Returns 1.0 if the entity is using sonic: Returns 1.0 如果entity 是using sonic boom, else it returns 0.0.
Returns 1.0 if the entity was last hit b: Returns 1.0 如果entity was last hit 由player, else it returns 0.0. 如果called 由client always returns 0.0. Relates 至`on_death` component.

Returns 1.0 if the potion type or effect: Returns 1.0 如果potion 類型或effect 是lingering, else it returns 0.0.
Returns 1.0 if the touch input only affe: Returns 1.0 如果touch input 只有affects touchbar, otherwise returns 0.0. Available 在Client (Resource Packs) only.
Returns 1.0 if this is called on an enti: Returns 1.0 如果此is called 在一個entity 在一個time 當it 是known 如果it 是在screen, else it returns 0.0.
Returns 1.0 if we render the entity's bo: Returns 1.0 如果we 繪製entity's bottom, else it returns 0.0.
Returns a number representing the client: Returns 一個number representing client RAM memory tier, 0 = 'SuperLow', 1 = 'Low', 2 = 'Mid', 3 = 'High', 或4 = 'SuperHigh'. Available 在Client (Resource Packs) only.
Returns a number representing the server: Returns 一個number representing server RAM memory tier, 0 = 'SuperLow', 1 = 'Low', 2 = 'Mid', 3 = 'High', 或4 = 'SuperHigh'. Available 在server side (Behavior Packs) only.
Returns a value in range [0.0, 1.0] base: Returns 一個value in 範圍[0.0, 1.0] based 在level seed.
Returns boolean whether an entity has an: Returns boolean whether 一個entity 有一個item in 它們的head armor slot 或not, 或false 如果no 實體in current context
Returns how much durability an item has: Returns how much durability 一個item 有remaining.
Returns how swollen an entity is. Genera: Returns how swollen 一個entity is. Generally applies 至creeper 和wither.
Returns if the item or block has all of: Returns 如果item 或block 有所有of tags specified.
Returns if the item or block has any of: Returns 如果item 或block 有any 的tags specified.
Returns the \"delay\" value from the mai: Returns "delay" 值從main-hand item's "minecraft:kinetic_weapon" component, 或0 如果component 是不present.
Returns the \"max_duration\" value of \": Returns "max_duration" 值的"damage_conditions" 從main-hand item's "minecraft:kinetic_weapon" component, 或0 如果component 是不present.
Returns "max_duration" 值的"dismount_conditions" 從main-hand item's "minecraft:kinetic_weapon" component, 或0 如果component 是不present.
Returns "max_duration" 值的"knockback_conditions" 從main-hand item's "minecraft:kinetic_weapon" component, 或0 如果component 是不present.
Returns the X eye rotation of the entity: Returns X eye 旋轉的entity, else it returns 0.0. Applies 至guardian.
Returns the Y eye rotation of the entity: Returns Y eye 旋轉的entity, else it returns 0.0. Applies 至guardian.
Returns the absolute position of an enti: Returns absolute 位置的一個entity. Takes one argument that represents desired axis (0 == x-axis, 1 == y-axis, 2 == z-axis).
Returns the amount of time an item has b: Returns 數量的time 一個item 有been in use in seconds up 至maximum duration, else 0.0 如果it doesn't make sense.
Returns the anger level of the entity [0: Returns anger level 的entity [0,n). 在errors 或if actor 有no anger level, returns 0. Available in behavior pack 動畫contexts only.
Returns the angle of the tail of the ent: Returns 角度的tail 的entity 如果it makes sense, else it returns 0.0. Generally applies 至donkey, horse, mule, skeleton horse, wolf, zombie horse.
Returns the axis aligned bounding box of: Returns axis aligned bounding box 的一個bone 作為一個structure 使用members '.min', '.max', along 使用'.x', '.y', 和'.z' values 為each.
Returns the block face for this (only va: Returns 方塊face 為此(只有valid 為certain triggers such 作為placing blocks, 或interacting 使用block) (Down=0.0, Up=1.0, North=2.0, South=3.0, West=4.0, East=5.0, Undefined=6.0).
Returns the body pitch rotation if calle: Returns body pitch 旋轉如果called 在一個entity, else it returns 0.0.
Returns the body pitch world-rotation of: Returns body pitch world-旋轉的一個valid rider 在provided index 如果called 在一個entity, else it returns 0.0.
Returns body pitch world-旋轉的ride 一個entity, else it returns 0.0.
Returns the body yaw rotation if called: Returns body yaw 旋轉如果called 在一個entity, else it returns 0.0.
Returns the body yaw world-rotation of a: Returns body yaw world-旋轉的一個valid rider 在provided index 如果called 在一個entity, else it returns 0.0.
Returns the body yaw world-rotation of t: Returns body yaw world-旋轉的ride 的on 一個entity, else it returns 0.0.
Returns the brightness of the moon (FULL: Returns brightness 的moon (FULL_MOON=1.0, WANING_GIBBOUS=0.75, FIRST_QUARTER=0.5, WANING_CRESCENT=0.25, NEW_MOON=0.0, WAXING_CRESCENT=0.25, LAST_QUARTER=0.5, WAXING_GIBBOUS=0.75).
Returns the current facing of the player: Returns current facing 的player (Down=0.0, Up=1.0, North=2.0, South=3.0, West=4.0, East=5.0, Undefined=6.0).
Returns current facing 的player ignoring up/down part 的direction (North=2.0, South=3.0, West=4.0, East=5.0, Undefined=6.0).
Returns the current sit amount of the en: Returns current sit 數量的entity. Applies generally 至panda.
Returns the current texture of an item w: Returns current 紋理的一個item whose appearance 可以change (such 作為一個drawn bow).
Returns the current time stamp of the le: Returns current 時間stamp 的level. Generally applies 至cod, piglin, pufferfish, tropical fish, salmon.
Returns the current walk speed of the en: Returns current walk 速度的entity. 可以be modified 由status flags such 作為`is_baby` 或`on_fire`.
Returns the day of the current world. Wh: Returns day 的current world. 當the 世界是first created, that 是day `1`.
Returns the distance of the root of this: Returns 距離的root 的此entity 或particle emitter 從camera.
Returns the elapsed ticks since the mob: Returns elapsed ticks since 生物started dying.
Returns the entity's mark variant value,: Returns entity's mark variant value, 如果entity 有`mark_variant` component.
Returns the entity's skin ID (related to: Returns entity's skin ID (related 至`skin_id` component).
Returns the entity's variant index. Rela: Returns entity's variant index. Relates 至`variant` component.
Returns the ground speed of the entity i: Returns ground 速度的entity in meters/second.
Returns the head x world-rotation of the: Returns head x world-旋轉的ride 的一個entity, else it returns 0.0.
Returns head x world-旋轉的rider 實體在provided index, else it returns 0.0. Takes one argument 作為一個parameter.
Returns the health of the entity, or 0.0: Returns 生命的entity, 或0.0 如果it doesn't make sense 至call 在此entity.
Returns the heartbeat interval of the en: Returns heartbeat interval 的entity in seconds. Returns 0 當the 實體有no heartbeat.
Returns the height of the block immediat: Returns height 的block immediately above highest solid 方塊在input (x,z) position
Returns the how much the offhand shield: Returns how much offhand shield 應該translate down 當blocking 和being hit.
Returns the hurt direction for the entit: Returns hurt 方向為entity, otherwise returns 0.
Returns the hurt time for the entity, ot: Returns hurt 時間為entity, otherwise returns 0.
Returns the initial (from the .geo) pivo: Returns initial (從.geo) pivot 的一個bone 作為一個structure 使用members '.x', '.y', 和'.z'.
Returns the initial (from the .geo) rota: Returns initial (從.geo) 旋轉的一個bone 作為一個structure 使用members '.x', '.y', 和'.z' in degrees.
Returns the integer id of an entity (act: Returns integer id 的一個entity (actor) 由its 字串name. Relates 至item 資料fields in recipes. Applies 至game versions 1.19.80 和higher.
Returns the lie down amount for the enti: Returns lie down 數量為entity. Applies generally 至panda.
Returns the limited life span of an enti: Returns limited life span 的一個entity, 或0.0 如果it lives forever. Applies generally 至evocation fang.
Returns the max durability an item can t: Returns max durability 一個item 可以take.
Returns the max render distance in chunk: Returns max 繪製distance in chunks 的current client. Available 在Client (Resource Packs) only.
Returns the maximum amount of time the i: Returns maximum 數量的time 物品可以be used, else 0.0 如果it doesn't make sense. Applies generally 至brush.
Returns the maximum health of the entity: Returns maximum 生命的entity, 或0.0 如果it doesn't make sense 至call 在此entity.
Returns the maximum trade tier of the en: Returns maximum trade tier 的entity 如果it 可以perform trades, else it returns 0.0
Returns the normalized progress between: Returns normalized progress between start 和end given value
Returns the nth head x rotation of the e: Returns nth head x 旋轉的entity 如果it makes sense, else it returns 0.0. Takes one argument 作為一個parameter.
Returns the number of entities (actors): Returns 數字的entities (actors) rendered in last frame.
Returns the number of entities for which: Returns 數字的entities 為which 此entity 是leash holder.
Returns the number of equipped armor pie: Returns 數字的equipped armor pieces 為一個entity 從0 至5, 不counting 物品held in hands. (至query 為hand slots, use `query.is_item_equipped` 或`query.is_item_name_any`).
Returns the number of ticks of invulnera: Returns 數字的ticks 的invulnerability 實體有left 如果it makes sense, else it returns 0.0. Applies 至wither.
Returns the phase of the moon (FULL_MOON: Returns phase 的moon (FULL_MOON=0, WANING_GIBBOUS=1, FIRST_QUARTER=2, WANING_CRESCENT=3, NEW_MOON=4, WAXING_CRESCENT=5, LAST_QUARTER=6, WAXING_GIBBOUS=7).
Returns the players level if the entity: Returns players level 如果entity 是一個player, otherwise returns 0.
Returns the position delta for an entity: Returns 位置delta 為一個entity. Takes one argument that represents desired axis (0 == x-axis, 1 == y-axis, 2 == z-axis). Applies 至player animation.
Returns the previous squish value for th: Returns previous squish 值為current entity, 或0.0 如果此doesn't make sense. Applies generally 至slimes 和magma cubes.
Returns the ratio (from 0 to 1) of how m: Returns ratio (從0 至1) 的how much between AI ticks 此frame 是being rendered.
Returns the ratio between the previous a: Returns ratio between previous 和next key frames.
Returns the remaining fuse time of the e: Returns remaining fuse 時間的entity. Returns -1 如果entity doesn't have 一個"minecraft:explode" component.
Returns the roll angle of the head of th: Returns roll 角度的head 的entity 如果it makes sense, else it returns 0.0. Applies 至how 一個wolf looks 在一個player holding food.
Returns roll counter 的entity. Generally applies 至panda.
Returns the root entity identifier. Depr: Returns root 實體identifier. Deprecated; use `query.is_owner_identifier_any` instead 如果possible so names 可以be changed later without breaking content.
Returns the rotation of the bed the play: Returns 旋轉的bed 玩家是sleeping on.
Returns the rotation of the camera. Req: Returns 旋轉的camera.  Requires one argument representing 旋轉axis you would like (0 為x, 1 為y).
Returns the rotation required to aim at: Returns 旋轉必需至aim 在camera.  Requires one argument representing 旋轉axis you would like (0 為x, 1 為y).
Returns the scale of how standing up the: Returns 比例的how standing up 實體is. Generally applies 至polar bear.
Returns 比例的current entity. 可以be 使用使用`is_baby` component.
Returns the shaking angle of the entity: Returns shaking 角度的entity 如果it makes sense, else it returns 0.0. Generally applies 至wolf.
Returns the sneeze counter of the entity: Returns sneeze counter 的entity. Applies generally 至panda.
Returns the specified axis of the normal: Returns specified axis 的normalized 位置delta 的entity. Applies generally 至elytra.
Returns the specified scoreboard value f: Returns specified scoreboard 值為此entity. Available 只有with behavior packs. Takes one argument - 名稱的scoreboard entry 為此entity.
Returns the speed of the entity up or do: Returns 速度的entity up 或down in meters/second, where positive 是up.
Returns the squish value for the current: Returns squish 值為current entity, 或0.0 如果此doesn't make sense. Applies 至slimes 和magma cubes.
Returns the structural integrity for the: Returns structural integrity 為entity, otherwise returns 0. Generally applies 至minecart.
Returns the sum of 'num' random integer: Returns sum 的'num' random integer numbers, 每個with 一個value 從low 至high. Note: generated random numbers 是integers like normal dice.
